summary_text: Findings for run `adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:25971:run:20260404T090520:52378`: - Canonical bootstrap evidence is produced by this command chain in `codex-kernel-guard` bootstrap: - `scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh write <lane_count> <providers_csv> <mode> ...` - `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh record-provider ...` - `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh scheduler-state ...` - `scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh update ...` - `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh status` (validates all three). - Minimum files/scripts to inspect/act on: - `scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh` - `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh` - `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh` - `scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh` - `scripts/lib/kernel-state-paths.sh` - `scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-workspace.sh` (for cross-path linkage, not required for health validity) - `scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh` (launch sequence writes receipt + ledger + compact updates) - Minimum commands to establish/verify evidence for this run (in order): - `KERNEL_RUN_ID=... bash scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh write 6 "<providers>" <normal|degraded-allowed>` - `KERNEL_RUN_ID=... bash scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh record-provider codex success <note>` - `KERNEL_RUN_ID=... bash scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh record-provider glm success <note>` - `KERNEL_RUN_ID=... bash scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh record-provider <specialist> success <note>` - `KERNEL_RUN_ID=... bash scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh scheduler-state running` - `KERNEL_RUN_ID=... bash scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh update ...` - `KERNEL_RUN_ID=... bash scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh status` - `KERNEL_RUN_ID=... bash scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-ledger.sh status` and `KERNEL_RUN_ID=... bash scripts/lib/kernel-bootstrap-receipt.sh path` - Mismatch observed: - `kernel-state-paths.sh` default root resolves to `~/.config/kernel` (receipt/compact/ledger default locations). - Existing run entries and health checks currently expect this run’s bootstrap path under repo-local `.fugue/kernel-state/...`. - Actual `bootstrap-receipt` currently exists under `~/.config/kernel/bootstrap-receipts/...`. - Runtime ledger for this run points to `.fugue` bootstrap/compact paths, so `runtime-health` now returns `bootstrap-receipt-missing` and `state: invalid`. - Net effect: evidence is split across roots; health gate fails despite a valid receipt existing in another location. - Immediate risk: - If `KERNEL_STATE_ROOT` / `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_RECEIPT_DIR` / `KERNEL_COMPACT_DIR` / `KERNEL_RUNTIME_LEDGER_FILE` are not consistently set at launch, bootstrap checks can fail before work starts due to path drift.
